subcodes.first_line: O ye divine friends, Manifestations of infinite favours, Dawning-places of the merciful Lord's bounties, and Daysprings of the stars of mystic knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی و مظاهر الطاف نامتناهی و مشارق احسان رحمانی و مطالع نجوم عرفان
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @thankfulness; gratitude, @praise and encouragement, @confirmations and rewards in teaching the Cause
